title: 06 tina crosses a sleeping fruit cosmology
prompt: REFERENCE AUTHORITY — Images 1 and 2 lock Tina, intact car, and lychee product entrance. Image 3 supplies appetizing tropical fruit-world material only. This is a radical world reveal, not a car transformation or flight scene. ONE RULE — Tina discovers that her entire neighborhood is a ceremonial game arranged across the sleeping body of a continent-sized fruit being; her bite makes it laugh gently in its sleep, and each breath rearranges streets, seasons, and tiny fruit societies across its surface. FRAME — Vast benign mythic panorama with intricate playful detail, photographed like a premium practical fantasy film rather than children's animation. Tina's ordinary dark car is a tiny but visible object on a road crossing the luminous cheek of a colossal serene sleeper made from mango, lychee, grape, and edible peel forms. Its closed eye is a lake; its hair is a tropical archipelago; its shoulders hold miniature cities and ceremonial sports. A soft sleeping smile sends one visible wave across the body: ahead is lush summer, behind is crystalline fruit-winter, and tiny societies cheerfully move their houses between seasons. Tina looks from the car window in cosmic mischief. VISUAL PROOF — recognizable tiny car and road; unmistakable continent-scale sleeping fruit body; multiple inhabited regions; one breath-wave reorganizing seasons. AVOID — horror giant, realistic flesh, Buddha or direct religious iconography, fruit portrait close-up, floating fruit collage, car peeling, parachute, generic candyland, destruction.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one extraordinary but coherent cinematic Peelerz commercial styleframe, never a collage, contact sheet, storyboard grid, or design sheet. Ben's brief is an open canvas: favor a bold whole- world creative situation over improving any existing car-peel, parachute, or mango-mecha idea. Preserve only the explicitly declared talent/location authorities. Make the prompt's single impossible rule visible at world scale with one dominant verb, clear spatial organization, and a youthful sense of wonder. The result can be excessive, mythic, psychedelic, deadpan, or impossible, but must remain benign, appetizing, and not preschool-coded. No car opening into petals, no parachute, no robot/mecha armor, no construction-helper crew, no rainbow arch, no generic cheering gummy crowd, no captions, labels, borders, watermarks, gore, weapons, or invented package copy.
